queries.question: List the status of subtitles available at each streaming service.
queries.sql: SELECT Subtitles.default_subtitle  from Streaming_Services_Subtitles join Subtitles on Streaming_Services_Subtitles.subtitle_id = Subtitles.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Services_Subtitles.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Services.id   GROUP BY Streaming_Services_Subtitles.subtitle_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streaming_Services_Subtitles.streaming_service_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streaming_Services)

queries.question: List the status of subtitles available at each streaming service.
queries.sql: select streaming_services.name , subtitles.default_subtitle from Streaming_Services_Subtitles join Subtitles on Streaming_Services_Subtitles.subtitle_id = Subtitles.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Services_Subtitles.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Services.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?default_subtitle WHERE {
  ?streaming_services_subtitles a :Streaming_Services_Subtitles .
  ?subtitles a :Subtitles .
  ?streaming_services_subtitles p:hasSubtitles ?subtitles .
  ?streaming_services a :Streaming_Services .
  ?streaming_services_subtitles p:hasStreaming_Services ?streaming_services .
  ?streaming_services p:name ?name .
  ?subtitles p:default_subtitle ?default_subtitle .
}

queries.question: For every streaming service, give me the corresponding languages and default subtitles.
queries.sql: select streaming_services.name , subtitles.language , subtitles.default_subtitle from Streaming_Services_Subtitles join Subtitles on Streaming_Services_Subtitles.subtitle_id = Subtitles.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Services_Subtitles.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Services.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?language ?default_subtitle WHERE {
  ?streaming_services_subtitles a :Streaming_Services_Subtitles .
  ?subtitles a :Subtitles .
  ?streaming_services_subtitles p:hasSubtitles ?subtitles .
  ?streaming_services a :Streaming_Services .
  ?streaming_services_subtitles p:hasStreaming_Services ?streaming_services .
  ?streaming_services p:name ?name .
  ?subtitles p:language ?language .
  ?subtitles p:default_subtitle ?default_subtitle .
}

queries.question: What languages are available for subtitles on each streaming service?
queries.sql: SELECT Subtitles.language  from Streaming_Services_Subtitles join Subtitles on Streaming_Services_Subtitles.subtitle_id = Subtitles.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Services_Subtitles.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Services.id   GROUP BY Streaming_Services_Subtitles.subtitle_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streaming_Services_Subtitles.streaming_service_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streaming_Services)

queries.question: What languages are available for subtitles on each streaming service?
queries.sql: select streaming_services.name , subtitles.language from Streaming_Services_Subtitles join Subtitles on Streaming_Services_Subtitles.subtitle_id = Subtitles.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Services_Subtitles.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Services.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?language WHERE {
  ?streaming_services_subtitles a :Streaming_Services_Subtitles .
  ?subtitles a :Subtitles .
  ?streaming_services_subtitles p:hasSubtitles ?subtitles .
  ?streaming_services a :Streaming_Services .
  ?streaming_services_subtitles p:hasStreaming_Services ?streaming_services .
  ?streaming_services p:name ?name .
  ?subtitles p:language ?language .
}

queries.question: what language and default subtitle is common for all streaming services?
queries.sql: SELECT Subtitles.language, Subtitles.default_subtitle  from Streaming_Services_Subtitles join Subtitles on Streaming_Services_Subtitles.subtitle_id = Subtitles.id join Streaming_Services on Streaming_Services_Subtitles.streaming_service_id = Streaming_Services.id   GROUP BY Streaming_Services_Subtitles.subtitle_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streaming_Services_Subtitles.streaming_service_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streaming_Services)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Which languages and default subtitles are associated with every streaming service?
List the status of subtitles available at each streaming service.
What languages are available for subtitles on each streaming service?
